title: Norantea selloi
taxonomy: Norantea selloi is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Norantea, which is a small genus of plants endemic to the tropical forests of South America. The plant is classified as a flowering plant, specifically a shrub, and is native to the tropical regions of the continent. Its classification is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae, and its family is one of the largest in the plant kingdom. The Norantea selloi is a part of the larger Angiospermophyta, a group of flowering plants.
